message:
test(dep): add comprehensive E2E tests for mermaid format output

Add tests for `br dep tree --format=mermaid` covering:
- Basic mermaid syntax validation
- Dependency graph shapes (linear, branching, diamond)
- Edge cases (empty deps, single node, deep trees)
- Title escaping for mermaid syntax
- Error handling for non-existent issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
